BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin on the department methods-workshop finances after the venue mentioned the room-hire rate might rise. Pre-review with the university finance office.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with the finance office once the 2025 actuals close.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Room hire rises to 750/mo if the venue passes through higher costs
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs 2,670 + 100 increase = 2,770. At 95/participant, 2,770 / 95 = 29.2 -> 30 participants minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within buffer at 55 participants.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - room hire to 850/mo (unlikely per the venue office)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. The venue office said this was unlikely but wanted a stress test.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~28-30 participants at the current cost structure. At 55 we have plenty of headroom; even at the winter low we stay safe.
ActionItems: Wait for the venue office to confirm the room-hire situation
Revisit after year-end with the finance office for proper modelling
